items.title_en: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
items.title_zh: 华尔街顶级分析师建议这三只股息股票以获得稳定收入
items.desc_en: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.
items.desc_zh: 根据 TipRanks 的追踪，以下是华尔街顶级专业人士重点关注的三只派息股票。

items.title_en: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场利用世界杯，Kalshi 增加了 300 万新用户
items.desc_en: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.
items.desc_zh: 预测市场推出了一些以足球运动员为主角的广告，并建立了合作伙伴关系，在比赛期间在更多地方展示其品牌。

items.title_en: Russia pounds Kyiv in major ballistic missile attack
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在重大弹道导弹袭击中袭击基辅
items.desc_en: Powerful explosions thundered across the darkened city in an attack that involved 41 missiles of various types and ravaged buildings across several districts.
items.desc_zh: 这次袭击袭击了黑暗的城市，发生了强烈的爆炸，共发射了 41 枚不同类型的导弹，多个地区的建筑物被毁。

items.title_en: Samsung reportedly cuts some U.S. jobs, offers relocations ahead of HQ move: Reuters
items.title_zh: 据报道，三星在美国裁员，并在总部搬迁之前进行搬迁：路透社
items.desc_en: The Korean electronics giant as reportedly reduced staff at its U.S. display, phone and other consumer electronics operations.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这家韩国电子巨头削减了其美国显示器、电话和其他消费电子业务的员工数量。

items.title_en: American Airlines CEO lays out his vision to close a more than $3 billion profit gap
items.title_zh: 美国航空首席执行官提出了缩小超过 30 亿美元利润缺口的愿景
items.desc_en: The carrier is working on improving reliability, investing in more premium seats and lounges, and considering Boeing and Airbus for a new wide-body plane order.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司正在努力提高可靠性，投资更多的优质座椅和休息室，并考虑向波音和空客订购新的宽体飞机订单。

items.title_en: Housing costs is the top political issue for young voters, CNBC survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查发现，住房成本是年轻选民面临的首要政治问题
items.desc_en: The cost of housing is the top priority for voters ages 18 to 34, besting food and healthcare cost concerns, the CNBC All-America Economic Survey found.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 全美经济调查发现，住房成本是 18 至 34 岁选民最关心的问题，超过了食品和医疗保健成本。

items.desc_zh: 此次逮捕行动将美国置于从罗马尼亚一直延伸到英国的国际法律传奇的中心。

items.title_en: Messi on the brink of history - will it be his last World Cup game?
items.title_zh: 梅西站在历史的边缘——这会是他最后一场世界杯比赛吗？
items.desc_en: Argentina captain Lionel Messi will play his 34th World Cup match in Sunday's final, but will it be his last appearance?
items.desc_zh: 阿根廷队长梅西将在周日的决赛中参加他的第 34 场世界杯比赛，但这会是他最后一次出场吗？

items.title_en: U.S. says it targeted Iranian forces after attacks that killed two American service members
items.title_zh: 美国表示，在造成两名美国军人死亡的袭击事件后，它以伊朗军队为目标
items.desc_en: Centcom says it hit Iran's coastal surveillance and air defense facilities a day after two U.S. troops were killed in an Iranian strike on Jordan.

items.desc_zh: 乔治敦和凯图马港之间的船只倾覆后，迄今为止已有八名乘客获救。

items.title_zh: 机场老板表示，新的欧盟边境系统将护照检查时间延长了两倍

items.desc_zh: 瑞安航空还警告今年夏天前往欧洲的乘客做好长时间等待的准备。

items.title_en: Cybersecurity risks posed by over-the-air tech in autos has analysts concerned
items.title_zh: 汽车无线技术带来的网络安全风险引起分析师的担忧
items.desc_en: The automotive industry's increasing use of over-the-air technology makes it more susceptible to cyberattacks, analysts say.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，汽车行业越来越多地使用无线技术，使其更容易受到网络攻击。

items.title_en: Taylor Farms recalls iceberg lettuce in 27 states due to cyclosporiasis outbreak
items.title_zh: 因环孢子虫病爆发，泰勒农场在 27 个州召回卷心生菜
items.desc_en: Taylor Farms is recalling iceberg lettuce in 27 states because of the potential that the greens could be contaminated with cyclosporiasis.
items.desc_zh: 泰勒农场正在 27 个州召回卷心生菜，因为这些蔬菜可能受到环孢子虫病的污染。

items.title_en: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
items.title_zh: 议会支持罢免匈牙利总统同意辞职
items.desc_en: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.
items.desc_zh: 塔马斯·苏约克被视为欧尔班的忠实拥护者，他必须在周六晚上之前同意结束自己的任期。

items.title_en: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
items.title_zh: 德国政客因代孕争议辞职
items.desc_en: Jens Spahn faced criticism over his use of a surrogate, a ban on which he previously backed.
items.desc_zh: 延斯·斯潘 (Jens Spahn) 因使用代孕妈妈而受到批评，他此前曾支持这项禁令。

items.title_en: Why Dana White thinks much more of UFC's future will be Power Slap and boxing
items.title_zh: 为什么白大拿 (Dana White) 认为 UFC 的未来更多的是 Power Slap 和拳击
items.desc_en: UFC president and CEO Dana White predicted that Power Slap may become as big as his flagship fighting sport at the Game Plan conference in New York.
items.desc_zh: UFC 总裁兼首席执行官达纳·怀特 (Dana White) 在纽约举行的 Game Plan 会议上预测，Power Slap 可能会像他的旗舰格斗运动一样重要。

items.title_en: World Cup audience stayed bipartisan despite Trump's prominent role, CNBC survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查发现，尽管特朗普扮演重要角色，世界杯观众仍保持两党一致
items.desc_en: Nearly half of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup, with income and education shaping viewership more than party affiliation, the survey found.
items.desc_zh: 调查发现，近一半的登记选民观看了 2026 年世界杯，收入和教育程度对收视率的影响大于党派归属。

items.title_en: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication

items.desc_en: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.
items.desc_zh: 投资公司正在为迎接美联储公开评论较少的时代做好准备。有些人依靠人工智能来获得优势。

items.desc_zh: 主要股指每周下跌，但甲骨文和 IBM 等一些科技股的抛售尤其严重。

items.title_en: Laos says it can't determine cause of  tourist deaths linked to methanol
items.title_zh: 老挝表示无法确定与甲醇有关的游客死亡原因
items.desc_en: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.
items.desc_zh: 官员们表示，由于没有进行尸检，他们没有 2024 年死亡事件中中毒的证据。

items.title_en: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit

items.title_en: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
items.title_zh: 白宫为阿根廷队捍卫福克兰群岛旗帜
items.desc_en: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.
items.desc_zh: 这些言论可能会进一步加剧这一事件的争论，唐宁街已回绝要求国际足联进行调查的呼吁。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to tariff Canada over wildfire smoke choking northern US cities
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁对加拿大征收关税，原因是美国北部城市野火烟雾令人窒息
items.desc_en: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.
items.desc_zh: 加拿大领导人马克·卡尼表示，美国和加拿大在应对气候变化方面负有同等责任，专家称气候变化正在加剧野火状况。

items.title_en: One anti-war critic fined, another held as Russia clamps down on opponents
items.title_zh: 一名反战评论家被罚款，另一名因俄罗斯镇压反对者而被拘留
items.desc_en: While Boris Nadezhdin is barred from running for parliament, blogger Ilya Remeslo is remanded in custody.
items.desc_zh: 鲍里斯·纳杰日丁 (Boris Nadezhdin) 被禁止竞选议会议员，而博主伊利亚·雷梅斯洛 (Ilya Remeslo) 则被还押候审。

items.title_en: Tesla's charts point to a decline ahead, says Carter Worth
items.title_zh: 卡特沃斯表示，特斯拉的图表表明未来将出现下滑
items.desc_en: The technical analyst breaks down where he sees Tesla shares going.
items.desc_zh: 这位技术分析师分析了他对特斯拉股价的看法。

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_zh: Scribble Party

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价

items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_zh: 科技生活

items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_zh: Mirage
items.desc_en: Turn your SaaS into a clickable demo in 90 seconds.
items.desc_zh: 在 90 秒内将您的 SaaS 变成可点击的演示。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: Unabyss for Claude
items.title_zh: Unabyss for Claude
items.desc_en: Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude
items.desc_zh: 所有应用程序和法学硕士共享内存。在克劳德

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。
